visual_description: A person in profile holds a glass jar with a red-topped lid, looking down at it. In a separate scene, a man in a suit walks toward a group of people around a gurney holding a body wrapped in white cloth. Another person in a white coat stands nearby, while a man in a white shirt and tie stands at a counter.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and pace, accompanied by a soft, gentle background sound.
